title: SoniCraft Pack
description: SoniCraft with more exploration and extra mods included.
body:
![Sonicraft pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bcf1b0f3961fbc0f44bde6103ce9753fb2aa83e.png)                           

 




This modpack focuses on SoniCraft, immersing you in Sonic's World in Minecraft. SoniCraft Pack is joined by SimplePlanes, Parcool, Artifacts, Sonicraft Lively Zones, and DynamicTreesSoniCraft And More! this will bring exciting travel, lively areas, new structures, and unique treasures for a straightforward, exploration-focused experience.
 



Original Curseforge Modpack
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/sonicraftpack




SoniCraft & Logo Model Render by EnderPreston, SoniCraft Lively Zones by gamebreaks5872, DynamicTreesSoniCraft by Groupix05.
